notes: Snapshot of known-compromised package versions from major supply-chain incidents. Refresh from socket.dev/blog, github.com/advisories, and osv.dev. Entries with versions:["*"] flag the package name regardless of version — use these when a maintainer account was confirmed hijacked but the exact bad versions are not yet known to you.
